title: veronica serpyllifolia subsp. nummularioides
intro: Veronica serpyllifolia subsp. nummularioides is a subspecies of the creeping Veronica plant, belonging to the mint family (Plantaginaceae) and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Veronica serpyllifolia subsp. nummularioides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
